intro: Oreocome duriuscula, also known as Himalayan Oreocome, is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family and is native to the Himalayan regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and improve overall immune function. The bioactive constituents of Oreocome duriuscula include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used in traditional medicine and is prepared in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
